zh.lifeSummary: 當Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn於1234年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特時，她的父親Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill22歲，母親Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia30歲。她於大約1255年與Magnús Óláfsson, King of Mann and the Isles在曼島結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1303年10月18日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾登布藍享年69歲，埋葬在英國波克夏雷亞丁格也福利亞斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn于1234年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特时，她的父亲Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill22岁，母亲Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia30岁。她于大约1255年与Magnús Óláfsson, King of Mann and the Isles在曼岛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1303年10月18日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾登布藍享年69岁，埋葬在英国波克夏雷亞丁格也福利亞斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: MacDougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: Maire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn was born in 1234, in Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, was 22 and her mother, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, was 30. She married Magnús Óláfsson, King of Mann and the Isles about 1255, in Isle of Man. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 18 October 1303, in Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Greyfriars Church, Reading, Berkshire, England.

fr.Dunollie Castle, Oban, Argyllshire, Scot: Oban, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn est née en 1234, à Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Magnús Óláfsson, King of Mann and the Isles environ 1255, à Île de Man. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 octobre 1303, à Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Greyfriars Church, Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn 1234 in Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill 22 und ihre Mutter Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia 30. Sie hat um 1255 in Isle of Man Magnús Óláfsson, King of Mann and the Isles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Oktober 1303 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Greyfriars Church, Reading, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn è nata il nel 1234 nel Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Magnús Óláfsson, King of Mann and the Isles circa 1255, nel Isola di Man. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1303, nel Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Greyfriars Church, Reading, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearnが1234年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトで生まれた時，父Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaillは22歳，母Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadiaは30歳であった。約1255年にマン島でMagnús Óláfsson, King of Mann and the Islesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1303年10月18日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアダンブランで69歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアレアディンググレイフリアルズ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunollie Castle, Oban, Argyllshire, Scot: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 오반
ko.lifeSummary: Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn(이)가 1234년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1255년 맨섬에서 Magnús Óláfsson, King of Mann and the Isles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1303년 10월 18일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 던블랜에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 리딩 그리프리아르스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn nasceu em 1234, em Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Magnús Óláfsson, King of Mann and the Isles aproximadamente 1255, em Ilha de Man. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1303, em Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Greyfriars Church, Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Dunollie Castle, Oban, Argyllshire, Scot: обань, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn родилась в 1234 г. в местности аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Magnús Óláfsson, King of Mann and the Isles около 1255 г. в местности Остров Мэн. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 октября 1303 г. в местности дунблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности грифрярс чурч, ридинг, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn nació en 1234, en Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Magnús Óláfsson, King of Mann and the Isles aproximadamente 1255, en Isla de Man. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1303, en Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Greyfriars Church, Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
